    MissionTypes:LbZfvdmoeUCgcvQLaWGcJA

    labelThe New Frontier: Part 3 (0-0)
    titleThe New Frontier: Part 3
    majorTypestatic
    nextMissionCjDPx9RfQEy7G04J4_T6Yg
    dropJebQvxhDpUuTv0IOfiNEZQ
    keyLbZfvdmoeUCgcvQLaWGcJA
    descriptionTalk to Lieutenant Nguyen at the recycle station
    mustBeInorderYes
    minLvl0
    completeDescriptionLieutentant Nguyen: “Hmm.. so you are the latest recruit? I hope Admiral Ymer’s instincts are better than mine, because you don’t seem to be ready yet. The Aureus are not ordinary aliens, they use teleport to instantly appear in front of you, incinerate you and then teleports back to their domain. And to make everything worse, the Nezerians, in their desperate attempt to survive have managed to develop a bionic technology to fully control Moth Queens and their kin. We are almost certain the lunatic and mad man Xhargreg is involved somehow. But for now this has balanced the sector and stopped the Aureus from reaching us. Assist Ace with their defences and counter attacks against the Nezerians.”
    addedBodies["uGTn21FdcESE7sZxiJ9RPA"]
    tableMissionTypes
    availableYes
    typetransport
    maxLvl0
